data: {"generalSituation":"A continental airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong today. Under the influence of an easterly airstream, the weather will be bright over the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days, and there will also be a few showers. An active southwest monsoon and upper-air disturbances are expected to affect southern China during the weekend to midweek next week. There will be occasional heavy showers and thunderstorms over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260610","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"North to northeast force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny intervals and one or two showers.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":29,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":24,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":90,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":65,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":52,"PSR":"Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260611","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"East to northeast force 4, occasionally force 5 offshore later.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.
